← 江和洲 · 代表性项目Hezhou Jiang · Selected work
代表性项目 03 · 城市间碳转移与碳配额Selected work 03 · Intercity Carbon Transfer & Quota

投入产出视角下长三角城市群碳不公平格局及其碳配额研究Carbon inequality pattern and total carbon emission quota allocation in the Yangtze River Delta from an input-output perspective

揭示区域经济贸易中隐含碳转移的不公平格局，构建多维度合作博弈模型，为长三角城市群碳配额协同分解提供科学路径。Uncovering the carbon inequity embedded in regional trade, building a multi-dimensional cooperative game model, and delivering a science-based carbon quota allocation for the Yangtze River Delta.

期刊Journal · Acta Geographica Sinica, 2026 身份Role · 第二作者（导师一作）Second author (advisor as first) 研究区Study area · 长三角 41 个城市41 cities, Yangtze River Delta 方法Methods · EEIOA · Tapio脱钩 · 随机森林 · Shapley值 · 合作博弈EEIOA · Tapio decoupling · Random forest · Shapley value · Cooperative game
41 城市 · 18167 Mt 投入产出碳公平合作博弈

研究速览Key takeaways

  • 上海是长三角碳密集产品投入产出的核心枢纽，浙江省内转移量较低但与上海保持最紧密的碳转移联系。Shanghai serves as the core hub for carbon-intensive product flows; Zhejiang maintains the closest cross-province carbon ties with Shanghai despite low internal transfers.
  • 高收益城市环绕省级中心城市呈圈层布局，低收益城市多处于地区外围；"江浙沪"联盟在治碳博弈中易获超额收益。High-income cities cluster around provincial capitals; the Jiangsu-Zhejiang-Shanghai coalition secures disproportionate carbon governance benefits.
  • 人口规模与GDP是碳配额分配的核心驱动因素，科学技术支出与碳生产力在碳不公平格局形成中扮演关键角色。Population and GDP are the primary drivers of quota allocation; S&T expenditure and carbon productivity play key roles in shaping carbon inequity.
  • 基于碳不公平格局的配额方案兼顾高收益与低收益城市，能对碳密集型城市施加更有效的碳排放约束。The equity-based quota system balances pressures between high- and low-income cities and imposes effective constraints on carbon-intensive cities.
  • 忽视碳不公平的行政格局方案将加剧"马太效应"，导致碳配额向头部城市倾斜。Administrative-boundary-based schemes that ignore carbon inequity amplify the "Matthew effect," concentrating quotas toward dominant cities.
§

摘要Abstract

城市间经济贸易收益与碳排放代价的不均衡匹配会导致碳排放治理责任的不公平转移，但现有治碳责任分配路径并未充分考虑跨城市贸易与碳转移下的碳不公平格局。本文以长三角城市群41个城市为研究对象，基于市级投入产出表与直接碳排放数据，使用环境投入产出模型（EEIOA）、Tapio脱钩模型、随机森林以及Shapley值等算法，揭示城市群内因碳不公平关系导致的收益分异，并以"社会—经济—生态—公平—效率—可持续"多维度指标体系表征城市利益特征，构建合作博弈模型，实现长三角城市群碳配额的科学分解。

An uneven match between inter-city economic trade benefits and carbon emission costs creates inequitable shifts in carbon governance responsibilities, yet existing allocation approaches inadequately address carbon inequity patterns from cross-city trade and carbon transfer. Using the Yangtze River Delta Urban Agglomeration (41 cities) as a case study, this research employs environmental input-output analysis, Tapio decoupling, random forests, and Shapley values to quantify income disparities from carbon inequity, profiles urban interest characteristics through a multi-dimensional indicator system, and builds a cooperative game-theoretic model to achieve equitable carbon quota allocation.

关键词Keywords 双碳目标；区域协同；碳公平；碳额分配；投入产出；合作博弈；长三角dual carbon objectives; regional collaboration; carbon equity; carbon quota allocation; input-output; cooperative game theory; Yangtze River Delta

01

引言Introduction

中国"双碳"目标——2030年碳达峰、2060年碳中和——将推动一场广泛而深刻的经济社会系统性变革。在此进程中，城市间动态经济活动与碳排放具有潜在关联：部分地区通过购买其他地区生产的碳密集产品，间接规避碳排放责任，形成碳不公平格局。碳排放总量分配额度已超越单一环境治理任务，成为城市群经济社会发展水平、区域功能定位、产业和能源结构等多指标整体合作博弈问题。

China's "dual carbon" targets — peaking emissions by 2030 and achieving carbon neutrality by 2060 — require a profound socio-economic transformation. Inter-city economic flows embed hidden carbon transfers: regions that import carbon-intensive products effectively outsource emissions, creating a carbon inequity pattern. Carbon quota allocation has thus evolved beyond environmental governance into a multi-dimensional cooperative game involving development levels, industrial structures, and energy portfolios.

现有研究多从静态视角（如历史碳排放、资源禀赋）或单一供给侧/需求侧出发，未能充分考虑跨城市贸易下"供给—需求"全过程的减碳责任分配。本文的核心贡献在于：（1）从全过程投入产出与动态脱钩视角，揭示城市间因不均衡经济活动和碳转移所导致的碳不公平格局；（2）基于该格局构建城市群合作博弈网络，探索碳配额的合理分解路径。

Existing studies often adopt static perspectives (e.g., historical emissions, resource endowments) or single supply/demand-side views, failing to capture the full "supply–demand" responsibility chain in cross-city trade. This paper contributes by: (1) revealing carbon inequity patterns from imbalanced economic activities and carbon transfers through a dynamic input-output decoupling lens; (2) constructing a cooperative game network based on these patterns to derive equitable quota allocation pathways.

02

研究方法与数据Methods & data

研究区概况Study area

长三角城市群涵盖上海市、江苏省、浙江省和安徽省共41个城市，全域面积35.8万平方公里，2024年常住人口2.38亿人，地区生产总值33.17万亿元，是中国经济发展最活跃、开放程度最高和创新能力最强的地区之一。

The Yangtze River Delta Urban Agglomeration spans Shanghai, Jiangsu, Zhejiang, and Anhui — 41 cities across 358,000 km², with a 2024 population of 238 million and GDP of 33.17 trillion CNY, making it one of China's most dynamic, open, and innovative regions.

研究方法流程Analytical workflow

  1. 环境投入产出分析 (EEIOA)Step 1
    基于多区域投入产出表（MRIO）拓展，量化城市间经济价值流动与隐含碳转移，构建市际碳转移矩阵。Extends the MRIO framework with carbon intensity coefficients to quantify inter-city economic flows and embodied carbon transfers, producing a city-level carbon transfer matrix.
  2. 有向关联网络 (CIN) + Tapio脱钩Step 2
    采用差异化临界值算法构建经济活动与碳转移的有向关联网络（CIN），再通过加权比值与Tapio脱钩模型量化碳不公平格局，识别不同收益类型城市组团。Constructs a directed City-level Interaction Network (CIN) using differential thresholding, then applies weighted ratios and Tapio decoupling to quantify carbon inequity and classify cities by benefit type.
  3. 随机森林 + Shapley值合作博弈Step 3
    以"社会—经济—生态—公平—效率—可持续"多维度指标体系表征城市利益特征，使用随机森林获取变量权重，通过Shapley值构建合作博弈模型，实现碳配额分解。Profiles city interests via a multi-dimensional indicator system; random forest derives variable importance weights; Shapley-value cooperative game model allocates carbon quotas.

碳不公平格局量化Quantifying carbon inequity

对"有向"关联的解释：若某次经济价值转移与碳转移同时高于起点城市对剩余城市转移的平均值，则认为该有向联系具有显著耦合特征。在此基础上，采用加权比值算法与Tapio脱钩模型，通过相对脱钩指数 ε 判定各城市在碳不公平格局中的收益地位，识别出高收益、较高收益、收益平衡、较低收益、低收益五类城市组团。

A directed link is deemed significant when both economic value and carbon transfers exceed the origin city's average transfers to all other cities. Weighted ratios and Tapio decoupling then classify cities into five benefit groups — from high-income to low-income — based on their decoupling index ε.

合作博弈与碳配额分解Cooperative game & quota decomposition

合作博弈的经济逻辑根植于帕累托改进与规模经济效应：当城市群构建跨域合作网络时，成员间合作可产生规模报酬递增，降低边际减排成本。Shapley值通过遍历所有可能合作子集，精确量化单个城市参与合作前后系统总收益差值。碳配额权重由Shapley值归一化得出，结合GDP增长预期与碳强度下降目标，计算2017—2030年剩余碳排放额度。

The cooperative game logic rests on Pareto improvement and economies of scale: cross-city collaboration generates increasing returns and lowers marginal abatement costs. Shapley values — computed by enumerating all possible coalitions — precisely quantify each city's marginal contribution. Quota weights derive from normalized Shapley values, combined with projected GDP growth and carbon intensity reduction targets to allocate the 2017–2030 remaining carbon budget.

数据来源Data sources

投入产出数据来自中国碳核算数据库CEADs，使用2017年长三角41城市42部门投入产出表。碳排放数据同样来自CEADs。人口、经济与社会统计数据来自各城市统计年鉴，能源利用效率数据来自Chen et al. (2022)，土地碳储量数据来自Li et al. (2023)。

Input-output data from CEADs (China Emission Accounts & Datasets), using 2017 MRIO tables for 41 cities × 42 sectors. Carbon emissions also from CEADs. Socio-economic statistics from city yearbooks; energy efficiency data from Chen et al. (2022); land carbon storage from Li et al. (2023).

03

结果分析Results

长三角碳不公平格局Carbon inequity patterns in the YRD

通过EEIOA计算得到2017年长三角41个城市之间经济转移与碳转移分布。结果表明：大部分经济转移与碳转移发生在省内同级城市之间；江苏省省内转移总量为其他省两倍以上；上海市与浙江省（尤其是杭州、宁波、绍兴等浙北城市）的经济活动联系最为紧密，这种活跃的跨省联系可以解释浙江省内部转移量较低的现象；安徽省与其他省市间的经济活动联系相对较弱。

EEIOA results for 2017 reveal that most economic and carbon transfers occur within provinces. Jiangsu's intra-provincial transfer volume doubles that of other provinces. Shanghai maintains the closest cross-province ties with Zhejiang (especially Hangzhou, Ningbo, Shaoxing), explaining Zhejiang's lower internal transfers. Anhui shows relatively weak economic linkages with other provinces.

进一步构建有向关联网络CIN发现：浙江省城市与上海市之间有向关联度显著高于江苏与安徽两省；安徽省整体展现出更大规模的碳密集型产品生产与消费需求，江苏省紧随其后。

CIN analysis reveals that Zhejiang cities show significantly stronger directed connections with Shanghai than Jiangsu or Anhui cities. Anhui demonstrates the largest scale of carbon-intensive product production and consumption demand, followed by Jiangsu.

Table 4长三角地区CIN出入权重汇总统计Sum of CIN in/out-degree weights
上海市浙江省江苏省安徽省
入权重 (Weight j→i) 汇总2.1134.3353.5267.48
出权重 (Weight i→k) 汇总3.8739.3549.2762.40

Tapio脱钩分析揭示了碳不公平格局：高收益及较高收益城市整体呈现环绕地区或省内中心城市的圈层式布局，低收益城市则多处于地区外围。浙江省城市普遍维持较低的碳密集产品生产规模（舟山、丽水除外），安徽省碳密集型产品生产规模整体较高（淮南、铜陵尤为突出），上海市处于地区最低水平。值得注意的是，南京和苏州虽为省会/经济龙头，却位于低收益城市行列——区域协同效应和严格的环保政策可能是其原因。

Tapio decoupling reveals the spatial carbon inequity: high-income cities cluster around provincial capitals while low-income cities occupy peripheral regions. Zhejiang cities generally maintain low carbon-intensive production (except Zhoushan, Lishui); Anhui cities show high production levels (especially Huainan, Tongling); Shanghai sits at the lowest level. Notably, Nanjing and Suzhou — provincial capital and economic powerhouse — fall into the low-income group, possibly due to regional synergy effects and strict environmental policies.

合作博弈与碳配额分解Cooperative game & quota decomposition

随机森林分析表明：人口规模与GDP始终占据特征指标重要性前两位，社会与经济公平在"双碳"目标实现中扮演核心角色。科学技术支出与碳生产力紧随其后，是形成碳不公平格局的关键效率指标。可持续性指标（人类发展指数、第三产业比重、土地碳储量）在碳不公平格局中的重要性相对突出，说明该格局也反映了地区可持续发展潜力的差异性。

Random forest analysis shows population and GDP consistently rank as the top two feature importance indicators, underscoring the central role of social and economic equity. S&T expenditure and carbon productivity follow as key efficiency drivers of carbon inequity. Sustainability indicators (HDI, tertiary sector share, land carbon storage) show relatively prominent importance in the carbon inequity pattern, reflecting differential regional sustainability potentials.

合作博弈结果表明：在碳不公平格局下，低收益城市间、高收益城市间以及高低收益城市结合所产生的利益特征均较为显著——优势互补或强强联合是区域合作成功的关键。在"三省一市"行政格局中，浙江与江苏两省展现出显著的带动作用。Shapley值计算显示，高收益城市（1.16）与低收益城市（1.32）获得的Shapley值显著高于其他类型，说明这两端是形成碳不公平格局的关键因素。

Cooperative game results: under the carbon inequity pattern, low-low, high-high, and high-low city pairings all produce significant benefit functions — confirming that complementary or strong-strong collaboration drives regional success. Under the administrative "three provinces + one city" scheme, Jiangsu and Zhejiang show pronounced catalytic effects. Shapley values for high-income (1.16) and low-income (1.32) groups significantly exceed other types, confirming these two ends as the key drivers of carbon inequity.

2017—2030年长三角城市群剩余碳排放总额度为18167.37 Mt。在碳不公平格局下，低收益与高收益城市均获得较高碳配额值——两类城市虽在碳不公平格局中收益各异，但其对碳密集型产品的消费或生产强度均体现了强劲的发展动力。而在"三省一市"与"一市一类"行政格局中，碳配额分解结果更多反映综合发展体量的对比，呈现出强者愈强、富者愈富的"马太效应"。

The total remaining carbon budget for 2017–2030 is 18,167.37 Mt. Under the carbon inequity pattern, both low- and high-income cities receive higher quotas — despite their contrasting positions, both groups' consumption or production of carbon-intensive products reflects strong development momentum. In contrast, administrative-boundary schemes exhibit a clear "Matthew effect" where quotas concentrate toward already-advantaged cities.

碳减排压力分析表明：面临较高碳减排压力的城市多处于低收益或较低收益区间，这些城市作为碳密集型产品的主要生产者，展现出较强的高碳排放惯性。基于碳不公平格局的配额方案能对这些城市施加更大减排压力；而行政格局下的方案，因未能识别碳转移的主要起点城市，难以对碳密集型城市施加有效碳排放约束。

Carbon reduction pressure analysis: cities facing higher pressure are predominantly in low- or lower-income groups — as major producers of carbon-intensive products, they exhibit strong high-emission inertia. The equity-based quota scheme imposes greater reduction pressure on these cities, while administrative schemes, failing to identify key carbon transfer origins, cannot effectively constrain carbon-intensive cities.

04

结论与政策建议Conclusions & policy implications

主要结论Key conclusions

（1）经济活动与碳转移的空间异质性。上海是省际经济活动与碳转移网络的核心节点；江苏省经济活力显著，省内转移规模领先；浙江省内转移量较低但与上海保持最紧密的碳转移联系；安徽省与其他省市间的经济联系较弱，自身碳密集产品生产规模较高。

(1) Spatial heterogeneity in economic activity and carbon transfer. Shanghai is the core hub of inter-provincial economic and carbon transfer networks. Jiangsu shows the strongest intra-provincial economic vitality. Zhejiang maintains low internal transfers but the closest carbon ties with Shanghai. Anhui exhibits weak cross-province linkages but high carbon-intensive production.

（2）碳不公平格局的形成机制。保持低生产高消费特征的城市更容易获得超额收益。高收益城市多集中于中心城市周围，低收益城市多处于外围。人口规模与GDP是核心驱动因素，科学技术支出与碳生产力在碳不公平格局形成中扮演关键角色，可持续性指标的差异化也反映了区域发展潜力的不均衡。

(2) Formation mechanism of carbon inequity. Cities with low production but high consumption of carbon-intensive products are more likely to secure excess benefits. High-income cities cluster around central cities; low-income cities occupy peripheries. Population and GDP are core drivers; S&T expenditure and carbon productivity play key roles; sustainability indicators reflect uneven regional development potentials.

（3）碳配额方案的比较优势。基于碳不公平格局的配额方案能有效避免"马太效应"，同时照顾高收益与低收益城市的减排需求，优势互补合作将产生更多发展利益。该方案能对碳密集型城市施加更有效的碳排放约束，为地区整体实现"双碳"目标提供有力支撑。

(3) Comparative advantages of equity-based quotas. The equity-based scheme avoids the "Matthew effect," balances emission reduction pressures between high- and low-income cities, and generates enhanced developmental benefits through complementary cooperation. It imposes effective constraints on carbon-intensive cities and provides robust support for regional "dual carbon" targets.

政策建议Policy implications

建议构建区域内省市间的碳排放权交易合作机制，通过市场化手段促进配额合理分配与流通。针对省内碳排放领先城市，加大产业结构调整力度，优化能源消费结构；对碳排放量极高的城市实施更严格的环境监管。深化沪浙经济合作，推动产业链和供应链的低碳化重构。对安徽省加大国家和省级层面的支持力度，通过政策倾斜和资金扶持促进其产业结构优化。

We recommend establishing a regional carbon emission trading cooperation mechanism to promote market-based quota allocation and circulation. For high-emission cities, accelerate industrial restructuring and energy mix optimization with stricter environmental regulation. Deepen Shanghai-Zhejiang economic cooperation for low-carbon supply chain restructuring. Provide enhanced national and provincial support to Anhui for industrial optimization through policy incentives and funding.
